rejection_criteria: MRP, MFD, Batch & Lot number visible

food_products.notes: Must be cropped separately and added as a new image

clothing.notes: Size chart is mandatory. Headcut/facecut(Half Face) images must not be passed

l3_improvements.heels: Add heel height measurement (inches) in image
l3_improvements.sports_shoes: Add weight and sole material info
l3_improvements.sandals: Add strap detail and material closeup

meat_nonveg.special_rules: Meat on black matte finish cutlery

fruits_vegetables.special_rules: Fresh product photography, natural lighting preferred

frozen.special_rules: Show pack + product inside if possible

homogeneous.description: Single product combo with quantity tag
image_rules: Tag on top right with product info (grammage, pieces)
VQC adds tag - brand provides clean PNG

heterogeneous.description: Multiple products combo (same or different kind)
image_rules: All products visible with description tags
Tag on top right of each product
Two types: same brand different products, or different brands

l3_improvement_suggestions._description: Category-specific improvements to elevate UX quality. Add more as identified.

footwear.heels: Add heel height in inches as overlay/callout on image
footwear.sports_shoes: Add weight, sole material, and arch support info
footwear.sandals: Show strap detail and material closeup

clothing.dresses: Show garment length measurement on model/flat lay
clothing.shirts: Show collar style detail, fabric closeup

electronics.earbuds: Add battery life, driver size callout
electronics.cables: Show connector type closeup and length
electronics.power_banks: Show capacity, ports, and size comparison

kitchen.cookware: Show dimensions, capacity, and material callout
kitchen.storage: Show capacity in liters and what fits inside

food.ready_to_eat: Show prepared dish image as lifestyle shot

personal_care.skincare: Show key ingredients and skin type suitability
personal_care.haircare: Show hair type suitability and key benefits

mandatory_detection_rules._description: Rules for automated detection of missing mandatory images

food_fssai_check.check: At least one image should contain FSSAI logo/text
food_fssai_check.method: OCR or image classification on info images

food_nutrition_check.check: At least one image should show nutrition facts table
food_nutrition_check.method: OCR for 'Nutrition' or table structure detection

clothing_size_chart.check: Must have a size chart image

min_image_count.check: Min 7 images per SPIN (guideline), flag if < 4

resolution_check.check: MN image must be 1920x1920, others 1200x1200 minimum
